节点.描述: 模块头结点，源自 @kit 注释

节点.功能描述: The stream module provides a comprehensive set of stream processing capabilities, including four types of streams: - Writable: streams designed for writing data to. - Readable: streams designed for reading data from. - Duplex: streams that are both readable and writable. - Transform: a specialized type of duplex stream that can modify or transform data as it's being written and read.
Return readable options.

Specifies the encoding format of the data. If this parameter is provided, the readable stream decodes the data into a string in the specified encoding format. Default: utf8. If an invalid string is entered, a 401 exception is thrown in the Readable constructor. Supported encoding formats: utf-8, ibm866, iso-8859-2, iso-8859-3, iso-8859-4, iso-8859-5, iso-8859-6, iso-8859-7, iso-8859-8, iso-8859-8-i, iso-8859-10, iso-8859-13, iso-8859-14, iso-8859-15, koi8-r, koi8-u, macintosh, windows-874, windows-1250, windows-1251, windows-1252, windows-1253, windows-1254, windows-1255, windows-1256, windows-1257, windows-1258, x-mac-cyrillic, gbk, gb18030, big5, euc-jp, iso-2022-jp, shift_jis, euc-kr, utf-16be, utf-16le.
Streams to which data can be written.
The Writable constructor.

writes a chunk to Writable and invokes callback when the chunk is flushed. The return value indicates whether the internal buffer of the Writable reaches the hightWaterMark. If true is returned, the buffer does not reach the hightWaterMark. If false is returned, the buffer has been reached. The write function should be called after the drain event is triggered. If the write function is called continuously, the chunk is still added to the buffer until the memory overflows 1.Mandatory parameters are left unspecified; 2.Incorrect parameter types; 3.Parameter verification failed.
注释信息: @param { string | Uint8Array } [chunk] - Data to be written.
@returns { boolean } Write success returns true, write failure returns false.
@throws { BusinessError } 10200035 - The doWrite method has not been implemented.
@throws { BusinessError } 10200036 - The stream has been ended.
@throws { BusinessError } 10200037 - The callback is invoked multiple times consecutively.
节点.return_description: Write success returns true, write failure returns false.

error_codes.description: The doWrite method has not been implemented.
The callback is invoked multiple times consecutively.

The Readable constructor. 1.Mandatory parameters are left unspecified; 2.Incorrect parameter types; 3.Parameter verification failed.

Reads a buffer of a specified size from the buffer. If the available buffer is sufficient, the result of the specified size is returned. Otherwise, if Readable has ended, all remaining buffers are returned. 1.Mandatory parameters are left unspecified; 2.Incorrect parameter types; 3.Parameter verification failed.
注释信息: @param { number } size - Expected length of the data to be read.
@returns { string | null } If no data is available to read, null is returned.
@throws { BusinessError } 10200038 - The doRead method has not been implemented.

parameters.说明: Expected length of the data to be read.

节点.功能描述: Returns boolean indicating whether it is in ObjectMode.
Is true if it is safe to call readable.read(), which means the stream has not been destroyed or emitted 'error' or 'end'.
Returns the value of highWatermark passed when creating this Readable.
This property reflects the current state of the readable stream null/true/false.
Size of the data that can be read, in bytes or objects.
Getter for the property encoding of a given Readable stream. The encoding property can be set using the readable.setEncoding() method.
Whether all data has been generated.
Duplex streams are streams that implement both the Readable streams and Writable streams interfaces.
The Duplex constructor.

writes a chunk to Writable and invokes callback when the chunk is flushed. The return value indicates whether the internal buffer of the Writable reaches the hightWaterMark. If true is returned, the buffer does not reach the hightWaterMark. If false is returned, the buffer has been reached. The write function should be called after the drain event is triggered. If the write function is called continuously, the chunk is still added to the buffer until the memory overflows 1.Mandatory parameters are left unspecified; 2.Incorrect parameter types; 3.Parameter verification failed.
注释信息: @param { string | Uint8Array } [chunk] - Data to be written.
@returns { boolean } Write success returns true, write failure returns false.

@throws { BusinessError } 10200037 - The callback is invoked multiple times consecutively.
@throws { BusinessError } 10200039 - The doTransform method has not been implemented for a class that inherits from Transform.
节点.return_description: Write success returns true, write failure returns false.

Transform stream is a Duplex stream where the output is computed in some way from the input. Transform implementations must implement the doTransform() method and may also implement the doFlush() method.
The Transform constructor.

Convert the input data. After the conversion, Transform.push can be called to send the input to the read stream. Transform.push should not be called Transform.write to call. then this is the special value 'buffer'. Ignore it in that case. 1.Mandatory parameters are left unspecified; 2.Incorrect parameter types; 3.Parameter verification failed.
